---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(reticulate)
use_condaenv("dsfs2", required = TRUE)
```
```{r}
library(here)
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(rsample)
library(ISLR)
library(caret)
ruta <- here("main", "data", "processed", "imdb_with_sentiment.csv")

data <- read.csv(ruta, sep = ",")

data <- data %>%
  mutate(Votes = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", Votes)),
         Review.Count = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", Review.Count)))

data %>% glimpse()
```
```{r}
data <- data %>%
  select(-c(Title, Year, Director, Cast, Description, Review.Title, Review, metascore_missing, reviews_tokenizadas, sentiment))

data %>% summary()

```
```{r}


```
